trivia_bullets.text: Offender at Large is a red 5/4 Creature with type Giant Rogue — the Scryfall type line confirms this is a Giant, despite the figure reading as human-sized in the art (perspective and crowd scale compress the size). In Ravnica lore, Giants are relatively rare non-guild creatures [Scryfall].

Offender at Large has the Disguise mechanic: cast face-down for 3 mana as a 2/2 with ward 2, flip up for 4R. When it enters or is turned face up, it grants a creature +2/+0 until end of turn. Disguise is MKM's evolution of Morph — the ward 2 on the face-down creature adds meaningful protection against bounce or kill before flip [Scryfall oracle text, magic.wizards.com/en/news/feature/murders-at-karlov-manor-mechanics].

Flavor text: "In a city this big, anyone can blend in." — Imel of the Foundway Associates [Scryfall]. The Foundway Associates appear as recurring flavor-text voices across MKM; Imel is one of at least four named members (also: Udol, Algrom, Runubi), functioning as a secondary investigative faction in the set's world-building [Scryfall, WebSearch snippet].
sources: WebSearch: MTG Salvation MKM flavor text compilation

trivia_bullets.text: Artist Mike Bierek. EDHREC rank 25742 — one of the lower-ranked cards in this batch, consistent with Disguise 4R being expensive for Commander formats where 5-CMC creatures face steep competition [Scryfall]. The card also has a related token: A Mysterious Creature (the generic face-down 2/2 for all Disguise/Morph cards) [Scryfall all_parts].

related_cards.name: Goblin Maskmaker
related_cards.note: Reduces the cost of face-down spells including Offender at Large's Disguise cast

related_cards.name: A Mysterious Creature
related_cards.note: The generic face-down token that represents Offender at Large when Disguised

related_cards.name: Rubblebelt Braggart
related_cards.note: Also a large red creature at 5 CMC in MKM; thematic pair of Ravnica's criminal scene at high CMC
